notes.setup: To run examples: npx create-next-app@latest my-app --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app
notes.why_reference_files: These are teaching reference files. Next.js requires a full project to run (file-based routing, server runtime). Read the files, then try patterns in a real Next.js project.

files.01-app-router.tsx: Day 18  — App Router, file conventions, dynamic/parallel/intercepting routes
files.02-server-client-components.tsx: Day 19  — Server vs Client Components, RSC composition patterns
files.03-data-fetching.tsx: Day 20a — Server fetch, parallel fetching, Suspense, caching strategies
files.04-server-actions-api.tsx: Day 20b — Server Actions, Route Handlers, streaming, webhooks
files.05-middleware-auth.tsx: Day 21a — Middleware, NextAuth.js, RBAC, i18n, rate limiting
files.06-performance.tsx: Day 21b — next/image, next/font, next/script, metadata, Web Vitals
files.07-practice.tsx: Days 18–21 — Easy / Medium / Hard practice Q&A
